metadata.title: Heroes — Virtual Challenges Across Japan
metadata.description: Mt. Fuji, the 47 Ronin trail, Japan's railways. Purpose-built virtual challenges that fit your lifestyle. Every finish delivers a premium medal and plants a tree in Japan.
metadata.ogTitle: Heroes — Walk, run, ride — at your own pace.
metadata.ogDescription: Challenges that keep you moving. Community that keeps you going. Achievements that take physical form.

hero.label: Heroes · Virtual Challenges
hero.title: Japan's most beautiful places, at your own pace.
hero.subtitle: Walk, run, cycle. A virtual challenge that fits your lifestyle. Every finish earns a premium, built-to-last medal — and plants a real tree in Japan.

medal.label: 05 / A Token of Achievement
medal.title: A real medal — made to last.
medal.description: Every finish is commemorated with a weighty, beautifully-packaged medal shipped to your door. Not a mass-produced trinket — a keepsake worth the effort.
medal.scroll_hint: Tap to switch · front ↔ back · 3 medals

maps.title: Virtual Map
maps.description: At every checkpoint, learn the story and culture of the place. Discover Japan's beauty along the way.

impact.title: Tree Planting
impact.description: Every completed challenge plants one real tree in Japan, in partnership with local forest regeneration projects.

medals.title: Premium Medals
medals.description: A weighty, crafted medal and a special package for every challenge — a finish worth keeping.

teams.title: Community
teams.description: Go for it alone, or move together. Team up with family and friends, or meet new Heroes who share your goal.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.description: Unlock in-app achievements by distance, activity type, and streak. A collection that keeps you motivated.

inclusivity.title: Any movement counts
inclusivity.description: Walking, running, cycling, wheelchair. Whatever suits your body, at your own pace.

mechanism.label: 04 / How it works
mechanism.title: A simple system that ensures you stay on track
mechanism.subtitle: Even if you are new to virtual challenges, you can join with confidence. Follow these 4 steps to build healthy habits and enjoy a unique exercise experience.

choose.title: 1. Choose a challenge that fits you
choose.description: Select the level and goal that's right for you, from beginner to advanced.
items:
Path to Mt. Fuji Summit (74km / Easy)
For beginners, 2-3 month goal

Journey of the 47 Ronin (1,404km / Moderate)
Ongoing challenge, 6-12 month goal

Great Japan Railway Trek (3,170km / Epic)
Long-term habit building, 1 year+

move.title: 2. Record your daily activities
move.description: Simply enter your activities manually in the app after your workout.

discover.title: 3. Check progress on the virtual map
discover.description: Every time you record an activity, your avatar advances on the virtual map. Watch your progress build day by day — visible momentum that keeps you lacing up tomorrow.
items: Track every km as your avatar moves
Unlock checkpoint stories along the route

receive.title: 4. Receive your medal
receive.description: When you finish the challenge, celebrate it. Your medal arrives at your door — snap a photo, share it on social, tag @heroes, and become part of a community that turns finishes into stories.
items: High-quality medal delivered to your door
receive.footer: ※Shipping: Sent within 10 business days after finish is verified.

challenges.label: 01 / Challenges
challenges.description: Purpose-built routes through Japan. Each course carries its own story and cultural thread.

fuji.title: Mt. Fuji
fuji.subtitle: Sacred peak, primeval forest, five lakes — a 74 km pilgrimage at your pace.

ronin.title: 47 Ronin
ronin.subtitle: From Akō's gates to Sengaku-ji — 1,404 km of loyalty, step by step.

rail.title: Japan Rail
rail.subtitle: Wakkanai to Makurazaki — 3,170 km along Japan's rail spine.

sakura.title: Sakura
sakura.subtitle: A seasonal walk beneath the cherry blossoms.

impact.title: Every challenge grows a forest
impact.description: Each completed challenge plants one real tree in Japan, in partnership with a transparent forest regeneration project. A clear, honest connection between your effort and real change.

activities.message: Any movement, at your own pace.

cta.title: The reason to keep going is here.
cta.subline: Challenges that stay fun. Community that stays close. Progress you can see. Achievements you can hold.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.description: Questions, partnerships, or a story to share — we read every message and love hearing from Heroes and organisers alike.
contact.name: Name
contact.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
